title: GalaxyByne's Mailboxes
description: A simple to use, multiplayer friendly mailbox datapack using addresses as recipients.
body:
# Galaxy's Mailboxes

![Postbox](https://i.imgur.com/mp5I5Rc.png)
## Features:
- Custom Mailboxes for Receiving Mail
- Main Postboxes for Sending Mail
- Multiple Mailbox Ownership
- Custom Addresses

## Usage Instructions:
![Mailboxes](https://i.imgur.com/lhchYUR.png)\
Mailboxes are used to receive mail
1. Name a Paper to the Address you'd like to use
2. Place a container, this could be:
   - Chest
   - Trapped Chest
   - Barrel
   - Shulker Boxes
   - Hopper
   - Dropper
   - Dispenser
3. Run `/trigger CreateMailbox` while standing next to and looking at the container

Run `/trigger RemoveMailbox` while standing right next to and looking at a mailbox to remove it if it was created by you\
As Administrator:\
Run `/function mailboxes:remove/position/int` while standing right next to and looking at a mailbox to remove it\
Run `/function mailboxes:remove/address/int` while holding a paper named the address of a mailbox to remove it

---
![Postboxes](https://i.imgur.com/hbE0k9M.png)\
Postboxes are used to send mail\
Run `/function mailboxes:summon_postbox` to place a postbox\
Run `/function mailboxes:remove_postbox` to remove the closest Postbox within 3 blocks

1. Interact with the Postbox to use it
2. Interact again with the minecart to access the GUI
2. Insert your Mail in the top slot
3. Insert a Paper named with the recipient's address in the bottom slot
4. Press the Send Button and your Mail will be sent in seconds!

<video muted="" preload="auto" autoplay="autoplay" loop="loop">
    <source src="https://i.imgur.com/KIjJG55.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

## Bugs / Questions:
Please report any bugs / suggestions / questions on the linked discord
